channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Is the stock market in an AI bubble?
item.description: When it comes to AI investments, “a lot of money is going to get wasted,” MIT professor Daron Acemoglu told Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Why the OpenAI-to-Anthropic pipeline remains so strong
item.description: The pipeline from OpenAI to Anthropic remains strong as ever, with cofounder Durk Kingma becoming the latest high-profile figure to make the move. On Tuesday, Kingma, one of the lesser-known cofounders of OpenAI, joined Anthropic, best known for developing the rival AI chatbot Claude.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: Node.js previews network inspection support
item.description: Node.js v20.18.0, a just-introduced update to the Long-Term Support (LTS) version of the popular asynchronous, event-driven JavaScript runtime, features experimental network inspection support. Introduced October 3, Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Buttigieg Calls Out Musk Over False Claims About Flight Restrictions After Hurricane Helene
item.description: Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg corrects tech mogul Elon Musk's claims about flight restrictions after Hurricane Helene, highlighting the government's efforts to facilitate rescue and recovery operations.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The future of EV Charging looks a lot like an airport lounge
item.description: Charging companies and automakers increasingly see a need for stations with amenities: restaurants, good bathrooms, comfortable furniture, and canopies that shield from the rain, snow and sun.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Understanding exit codes on Linux
item.description: Whenever you run a command in a Linux terminal, a numeric exit code is generated – even if you see no sign of it. The code reports the success or failure of the command. And, if the command fails, it provides a value that hints at the problem. If the exit code is 0, all is well.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meet Spot, the LAPD's new crimefighting robot dog
item.description: The futuristic four-legged machine, which boasts the size and agility of a 70-pound golden retriever, has been met with both fascination and concern.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, The Hill

item.title: Austrian activist Schrems wins privacy case against Meta over personal data on sexual orientation
item.description: The European Union’s top court has said that social media company Meta can’t use public information about a user’s sexual orientation obtained outside its platforms for personalized advertising under the bloc’s strict data privacy rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Why airlines are turning to Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi
item.description: Last week, Air France was the latest major airline to announce it will be moving its in-flight Wi-Fi to the Starlink network, offering it for free to members of its frequent flier program.
item.dc:creator: Jack Kuhr, Fast Company

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What is RPA? A revolution in business process automation
item.description: What is robotic process automation? Robotic process automation (RPA) is an application of technology, governed by business logic and structured inputs, aimed at automating business processes.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AWS, 아마존 베드록 국내 정식 출시 “서울 리전에서 지원”
item.description: 아마존웹서비스(이하 AWS)가 3일 AWS 아시아 태평양(서울) 리전의 아마존 베드록(Amazon Bedrock)을 정식 출시한다고 발표했다. 아마존 베드록은 생성형 인공지능(AI) 애플리케이션을 구축하고 확장하려는 사용자가 특정 용도에 적합한 고성능 파운데이션 모델(FM) 및 거대언어모델(LLM)을 쉽게 찾고 접근할 수 있도록 하는 서비스다. AWS는 2023년부터 일부 지역을 시작으로 해당 서비스를 제공해오고 있다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Texas sues TikTok over handling of minors' data
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (R) sued the social platform TikTok for allegedly operating in a way that "puts the online safety and privacy of Texas children at risk" and violates a bill that aims to protect children from harmful practices related to the use of digital services, according to a T
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Starlink internet service being sent to places hit by Helene
item.description: FEMA said 60 Starlink units have been sent to multiple places devastated by the hurricane, with more to come.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI continues to burn money
item.description: Although OpenAI’s revenues are increasing significantly, the generative AI (genAI) pioneer remains dependent on financial injections, according to Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Understanding VBS Enclaves, Windows’ new security technology
item.description: Recently Microsoft announced efforts to improve security in its planned Recall AI assistant. Many of the details were not a surprise, as it built on familiar tools and services I’ve written about during the past few years, but the most important feature, VBS Enclaves, will be new to most of us.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Hurricane Helene brings climate change to forefront of the presidential campaign
item.description: The devastation wrought by Hurricane Helene has brought climate change to the forefront of the presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: 'Setback' for AI safety
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 23 having arrived September 17, work already has begun on JDK 24, with three features so far proposed for the release: warnings to prepare developers for future restrictions on the use of JNI (Java Native Interface) and a late barrier expansion for the G1 garbage collector
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile service outages reported by users
item.description: People in multiple cities posted about issues they were having, with many saying their phones were in "SOS" mode.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: San Francisco rolls out AI-powered cameras to combat crime
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses San Francisco deploying three advanced mobile surveillance cameras to deter crime in high-risk areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California governor vetoes bill to create first-in-nation AI safety measures
item.description: The decision is a blow to efforts attempting to rein in the industry that is rapidly evolving with little oversight.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, NewsNation
